lines.text: Welcome back. [pause] It's {{CLOCK}}. We are {{ELAPSED}} into the night.
I want you to notice your breath right now. [pause] Not to change it. Just to notice.
Breathe in through your nose. [pause] Four counts. Hold.
The smoke smell on the wind tonight — that's not your concern. You are inside. You chose inside.
Release. [pause] Out through your mouth.
Some of you have been listening for eight hours. I can feel the weight of that.
Your shoulders are high. [pause] Let them fall.
Breathe in. Four counts. The fires on State Street — that is not your body burning.
Your body is here. Your body is safe because you decided it would be.
Hold for four. [pause] Now release slowly.
I've been with people who opened their doors at this hour. [pause] I won't say what I saw.
But I will say this: the ones who stayed home are the ones who lived to pray.
Scan your body from your scalp downward. [pause] Where do you hold the fear?
Is it in your jaw? [pause] Let it soften.
Is it in your chest? [pause] Breathe into it. The fear is not the threat.
Tucker reported from the lake an hour ago. [pause] Some things happened there that the lake has already forgotten.
Water is forgiving. [pause] Water takes what is given to it.
You are not water. You are the one who stayed behind the door. That is strength.
Breathe in. [pause] ka-sarendah-mirthless. [pause] Release.
Scan downward. Your hands — are they clenched? Unfold them on your lap.
There's visibility dropping below two miles now. The smoke is heavy on the isthmus.
But you cannot smell it where you are. [pause] You are sealed. You are protected by your own choice.
Some of you made that choice out of love. Some out of fear. [pause] The Order teaches that these are the same.
Breathe in. [pause] Hold. [pause] Think of someone you did not open your door for tonight.
That person is alive or they are not. [pause] Either way, you did not kill them by staying inside.
You can release that. [pause] Let your breath carry it out.
The fires are real. [pause] The smoke smell is real. [pause] Your guilt is optional.
Scan to your belly. Is it tight? [pause] Breathe directly into that tightness.
Four counts in. [pause] Four counts holding. [pause] Four counts releasing.
I'm going to tell you something the Sisters know. [pause] Are you listening?
The ones who cannot sit still tonight — the ones who are moving through the city right now — they are not happy.
Happiness does not live in motion. It lives in stillness. [pause] You have found it. You are winning.
Breathe in. [pause] Hold the awareness of your own breath. That's the entire practice.
Eight hours in. Four hours remain. [pause] The longest four hours are the ones where you remember they exist.
So I'm asking you to forget. [pause] Forget the time. Forget the clock. Forget that the Purge ends.
Live in this breath. [pause] In this one. [pause] In this one.
The city outside is sorting itself. [pause] That is not your work.
Your work is to remain. To breathe. To let the walls hold what they hold.
Scan down to your legs. Are they restless? [pause] Can you feel them on the floor?
The floor is holding you. [pause] The walls are holding the night. [pause] You are held.
Breathe in. [pause] Four counts. [pause] The visibility is down to a mile and a half now.
But where you are, you can see your own hands. [pause] That is enough.
That is everything.
Release. [pause] Hold for four in the emptiness. [pause] Release again.
I sat with a woman once who had seen too much. [pause] She said the only way through was to stop looking.
I said, 'But you can still hear.' [pause] She said, 'I know. I cover my ears.'
She didn't mean physically. [pause] She meant with silence.
Breathe into that silence now. [pause] It's surrounding you. It's available.
You made it available by staying home. [pause] Honor that choice.
Breathe in. [pause] Hold. [pause] Release slowly into the dark.

tickerItems.text: VISIBILITY ALERT: Smoke drift reducing visibility to 1.2 miles across the isthmus. Multiple structure fires reported State Street corridor + near Capitol Square. Stay sheltered.
PURGE CLOCK: {{CLOCK}} — {{ELAPSED}} elapsed — 3 hours, 0 minutes remaining until all-clear at 07:00.
The ones who cannot sit still tonight are not happy. Happiness does not live in motion.
PurgeShield Structural Panels: 847 families stayed safe behind our barriers last year. You can too. Call 1-800-BARRIER now.
